evals.name: fresh-no-config
evals.prompt: I have a Vue project with English locale files in `locales/en/`. There's no i18n config file yet — I'll set that up later. Please translate everything to French and Spanish so I have `locales/fr/` and `locales/es/` populated.
evals.expected_output: Two new folders `locales/fr/` and `locales/es/` are created, each containing a `common.json` file with translations of every key from the English source. Nested structure (app, nav, actions, messages) is preserved. A `.metadata/` folder is created at the locales root with `translated.json` (every translated dotted key path), `translated-langs.json` (`["es", "fr"]`), and `hashes.json` (one SHA-1 hash per source key path).

evals.name: vue-syntax-preservation
evals.prompt: Sync the missing French translations for this Nuxt project.
evals.expected_output: `i18n/locales/fr/messages.json` is created with French translations. Vue i18n syntax is preserved: `{name}`, `{count}`, `{amount}`, `{field}`, `{min}`, `{percent}` interpolation variables stay byte-identical. `|` pluralization separators are preserved with the same number of variants. `@:nav.home` linked message reference is unchanged. HTML tags (`<a href="/checkout" class="btn">`) stay intact, only inner text is translated. Email `support@acme.com` is not translated.

evals.name: incremental
evals.prompt: I added some new keys to my English locale files. Can you translate them to the other locales? The Nuxt config has the languages configured.
evals.expected_output: Only the new keys (stats.growth, stats.trending, buttons.export in common.json; signup, errors.email_taken in auth.json) are added to fr/ and de/ files. Existing translations in fr/ and de/ are not modified. `.metadata/translated.json` is extended with the new dotted key paths (preserving the existing entries) and `.metadata/translated-langs.json` still contains `["de", "fr"]`. `.metadata/hashes.json` is created (it wasn't in the seed fixture): it gets a silent backfill of hashes for the previously translated keys plus new entries for the keys translated this run — none of the previously translated keys are re-queued. The `{percent}` and `{email}` interpolation variables are preserved in their translations.
